steps.t: Frodo is outside the Last Homely House, taking in the night air. Gandalf the Grey asked you to walk with Frodo Baggins and to gauge his state-of-mind.

Frodo is standing at a crossing of paths not far from the Last Homely House. Your walk with Frodo seems to have soothed some of his anxieties.
